untranslatable_reason: Signal requires detecting 'short-term downtrend for a few days' which cannot be precisely quantified without additional parameters (e.g., number of consecutive lower closes, or comparison against a moving average). The phrase 'excellent short entry signal' is subjective and lacks objective criteria. Translated the core price action pattern (open lower, rise to previous close) but the downtrend confirmation and entry quality assessment are not expressible with the allowed indicators.
translation_notes: Captured the mechanical price action: stock opens below previous close (open < prev_close) and closes at or above previous close (close >= prev_close). This represents the 'opens lower, rises till previous close' pattern. For exit, used reversal to previous close close. Downtrend confirmation would require additional indicators or parameters not provided. Reduced hold_days_max to 1 for intraday/short-term nature implied by 3-minute timeframe reference.
